title: NKKD-174 Wife's Company Drinking Party Video 29
description: My wife, who works for a corporate delica service company, has been enthusiastically participating in the new product tasting food fair at her place of employment the other day. It was said that everyone would evaluate the catered side dishes and hors d'oeuvres ... That night, my husband, I, welcomed my wife, who came home after drinking too much later than planned, saying, "I can't help it at all ...". However, when I suddenly noticed, a video of the drinking party on the day came out ...
